name: Hot Fudge Pudding Cake 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the granulated sugar, flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt.
3. Blend in the milk, melted butter, and vanilla extract until smooth.
4. Pour the batter into an 8 or 9-inch square baking pan.
5. In a small bowl, mix together the granulated sugar, brown sugar, and cocoa.
6. Sprinkle this mixture evenly over the batter.
7. Pour the hot water over the top; do not stir.
8. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes in a 350-degree oven or until the center is almost set.
9. Allow to cool for 15 minutes.
10. Spoon the pudding into dessert dishes, spooning sauce from the bottom of the pan over top.
11. Garnish with whipped topping.
